description: Generate a resident sprite sheet candidate from a character portrait. Codex runs as a sidekick (separate process from the GodSandbox app) and executes all steps autonomously.
technicalInputsMvp: slug — provided explicitly in MVP; future: auto-derived from displayName by game UI
agentRole: Codex sidekick — separate process from GodSandbox app. Codex executes all steps. The non-technical user only provides slug and portrait.

steps.description: Verify Eve baseline passes before proceeding.
steps.note: visual audit warnings (exit 0) are not failures

steps.description: Auto-generate job JSON (including characterProfile), set up folders, copy portrait reference, generate prompt from _template.md if absent.
Codex agent uses Codex pet to generate the sprite sheet. GodSandbox app must not call image generation APIs — this step runs in the Codex sidekick process only.
prohibited: Do not copy or resize the portrait as a substitute sprite sheet
Do not create a local handmade or synthetic sprite sheet
Do not treat any non-Codex-pet-generated image as a candidate

steps.description: Run the full validation suite (alpha, grid, visual audit).
nonBlockers: visual audit warnings (exit code 0, PARTS / TOP / BOT / BOUND)

steps.description: Human reviewer inspects contact sheet and confirms character identity.
PO confirms sandbox display fit. Required before ready promotion.

forbidden: Do not promote before PO visual confirmation
